name: @act-spec/builder-adapter
description: PRD-206 Builder.io adapter for the ACT (Agent Content Tree) v0.1 reference implementation. Consumes the Builder.io Content API and emits PRD-100/PRD-102 envelopes; supports two emission modes (pass-through emits a single `marketing:builder-page` block carrying the raw Builder tree as `payload`; extraction walks Builder primitives `Text` / `Image` / `Button` / `CustomCode` / `Section` / `Symbol` into `prose` / `code` / `marketing:*` blocks per a configured mapping). Public-key kind validation, draft / published version, optional locale fan-out via Builder targeting, opt-in experiment / variant emission, reference resolution with cycle tolerance, Symbol recursion bound, lastUpdated delta marker, HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verification. Implements the PRD-200 framework contract.
